extDesc.message: Crypto Fear & Greed sentiment indicator for Binance, OKX and Bybit charts.

extremesDesc.message: Distance from neutral zone (50). Shows how emotional the market is.

tfSpreadDesc.message: Difference between Fear & Greed zones across timeframes.

impulseDesc.message: How sharply short timeframe deviates from higher ones.

autoRefreshHint.message: Auto refresh on pair change / every N seconds.

errNoSymbol.message: Cannot detect symbol from URL on this page.

help_detectedPair.message: Detected pair shows the exchange and the trading pair detected from the active tab (e.g. BINANCE:BTCUSDT).

help_fng_range.message: Fear & Greed is a sentiment index from 0 to 100 for each timeframe.

help_zones.message: Zones: 0–25 Extreme Fear · 25–45 Fear · 45–55 Neutral · 55–76 Greed · 76–100 Extreme Greed

help_risk_title.message: Risk (0–100) is an instability index — NOT a buy or sell signal. It shows how dangerous the current state is.

help_risk_levels.message: Levels: LOW calm · MEDIUM unstable · HIGH turbulent · EXTREME extreme / chaotic

tip_vol24.message: Total futures trading volume over the last 24h

tip_oi.message: Total value of all open futures positions in USD

tip_funding.message: Periodic payment between longs and shorts. Positive = longs pay; negative = shorts pay

tip_ls.message: Ratio of long to short positions. Above 1.5 = crowd on one side

tip_taker.message: Ratio of aggressive buy to sell orders. Above 1 = buyers dominate

tip_rsi1d.message: Daily RSI. Above 70 = overbought; below 30 = oversold

help_vol24.message: • Volume 24h — total futures trading volume over the last 24 hours.

help_oi.message: • Open Interest — total value of open futures positions in USD.

help_funding.message: • Funding Rate — periodic payment between longs and shorts. Positive = longs pay; negative = shorts pay.

help_ls.message: • Long / Short — ratio of long to short positions. Above 1.5 = too many longs (⚠️ crowd on one side).

help_taker.message: • Taker Buy/Sell — ratio of aggressive buy to sell orders. Above 1 = buyers are more aggressive.

help_rsi1d.message: • RSI (1D) — daily Relative Strength Index. Above 70 = overbought; below 30 = oversold.

help_tip.message: Tip: if the symbol is not detected, open a chart or trading page with the symbol in the URL and click Refresh.

apiKeyLabel.message: API key (SentiPulse key, not Binance, OKX, Bybit)

apiKeyHint.message: Paste the key from your account dashboard.

toast_limit_text.message: You've reached today's pair limit ({0}/{1}). Please try again tomorrow or upgrade your plan.

err_offline.message: Server is unreachable or you have no internet connection.

err_timeout.message: Server did not respond in time. Please try again.

err_server_unavailable.message: Server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

err_payment_required.message: Payment required (plan restriction). Please check your subscription.

err_too_many_requests.message: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again.

err_unauthorized.message: Unauthorized (401). Please check your API key.

err_limit_exceeded.message: Daily limit exceeded. Please upgrade or try again tomorrow.

err_no_data.message: No data available or an unknown server error occurred.

checkKeyHint.message: Validate key and show your plan status.

apiKeyRevoked.message: This API key has been revoked.

apiKeyLimitExceeded.message: Daily limit reached for this key.

aiUpgradeHint.message: FREE · Upgrade to PRO or VIP

aiUpgradeToast.message: AI Analysis is available on PRO and VIP plans.

aiLimitText.message: You've reached today's AI analysis limit ({0}/{1}). Please upgrade your plan or try again tomorrow.

help_ai_desc.message: AI Analysis does not repeat the grid values. It gives a short interpretation, setup idea, what matters now, and a caution note for the current pair.

scannerEmpty.message: No pairs found in this zone

scannerUpgradeToast.message: Scanner is available on PRO and VIP plans.

scannerLimitText.message: You've reached today's scanner limit ({0}/{1}). Try again tomorrow or upgrade.
